identify_api_surface.expected_solution: Agent identifies the key classes and entry points in all three repos The answer must reference the canonical artifact(s) for this checkpoint at the pinned revision (basenames: transfer.py, manager.py, client.py, tasks.py, and serialize.py). The judge looks for the following concept tokens in the agent output: upload_file, S3Transfer, S3.resource.
evaluation_criteria: Cites at least one canonical file by basename (transfer.py, manager.py, client.py, tasks.py, and serialize.py) in the agent output
Mentions at least three of the canonical concept tokens: upload_file, S3Transfer, and S3.resource

trace_transfer_path.expected_solution: Agent traces the multipart upload flow across the three libraries The answer must reference the canonical artifact(s) for this checkpoint at the pinned revision (basenames: transfer.py, manager.py, client.py, tasks.py, and serialize.py).
evaluation_criteria: Cites at least one canonical file by basename (transfer.py, manager.py, client.py, tasks.py, and serialize.py) in the agent output
References the checkpoint goal as described in task.toml: Agent traces the multipart upload flow across the three libraries

evaluation_criteria: Cites at least one canonical file by basename (client.py and serialize.py) in the agent output
